nodes.name: CONF
nodes.description: The HUAWEI-DC-TRAP-MIB provides information about DataComm TRAPS.

children.name: hwDCCtrlTrap
children.description:
A string serving as a bit  map  for the trap
                events defined by the hwDatacomm traps. This
                object is used to enable and  disable  specific
                hwDatacomm traps where  a  1  in  the  bit  field
                represents enabled.  The right-most bit  (least
                significant) represents trap 0.

children.name: hwDCTrapReason
children.description: For the BTB system to report Trap Reason.
